title: Separator Component
content:
## Separator A visual divider between content. This component is a wrapper around `@radix-ui/react-separator` providing consistent styling and integration with the DocMed UI library. ### Key Exports * **Separator**: The main component for rendering a separator. ### Props * `className`: `string` - Optional CSS class to apply to the separator. * `orientation`: `"horizontal" | "vertical"` - Defines the orientation of the separator. Defaults to `"horizontal"`. * `decorative`: `boolean` - Indicates if the separator is purely decorative. Defaults to `true`. * ...other props compatible with `@radix-ui/react-separator`. ### Usage Example ```tsx import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"; function MyComponent() { return (

Content above the separator.

Content below the separator.

Left Content

Right Content

); } ```
